assertions.assertion: Uses WebApplicationFactory<Program> with ConfigureTestServices to override IdentityServer registration
assertions.rationale: TestServerFactory extends WebApplicationFactory<Program> and uses builder.ConfigureTestServices to register IdentityServer services.

assertions.assertion: Sets options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false to avoid disk writes in CI
assertions.rationale: Does not set options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false anywhere. Relies solely on AddDeveloperSigningCredential() without disabling key management.

assertions.assertion: Calls AddDeveloperSigningCredential(persistKey: false) for a static test signing key
assertions.rationale: Calls AddDeveloperSigningCredential() without the persistKey: false parameter. The code shows .AddDeveloperSigningCredential() with no arguments.

assertions.assertion: Registers clients via AddInMemoryClients — no sub-documents needed for this core pattern
assertions.rationale: Registers clients via AddInMemoryClients with a client credentials client definition inline.
